nasb.text: Thus they gave them Kiriath-arba, Arba being the father of Anak (that is, Hebron), in the hill country of Judah, with its surrounding pasture lands.

esv.text: They gave them Kiriath-arba (Arba being the father of Anak), that is Hebron, in the hill country of Judah, along with the pasturelands around it.

cnv.text: 以色列人把猶大山地的基列．亞巴，和它四圍的郊野，給了他們；亞巴是亞衲族的祖宗，基列．亞巴就是希伯崙。

ccb.text: 犹大山区的基列·亚巴及其草场，亚巴原是亚衲人的祖先，基列·亚巴就是希伯仑。
